data.name: CaSinEmpty
data.value: CA Social Insurance Number may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: CaSinInvalidLength
data.value: CA Social Insurance Number must have length 9 (digits only) or 11 (9 digits with two separator characters)

data.name: CreateResultErrorNull
data.value: CreateResult Failure error may not be null

data.name: CreateResultValueNull
data.value: CreateResult Success value may not be null

data.name: DescriptionEmpty
data.value: Description may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: FormatMaskEmpty
data.value: String formatting mask may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: FormatStrNull
data.value: String to format with a mask may not be null

data.name: UsSsnAllIdenticalDigits
data.value: US Social Security Number may not have 9 consecutive identical digits

data.name: UsSsnEmpty
data.value: US Social Security Number may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: UsSsnInvalidAreaNumber
data.value: US Social Security Number area number segment (AAA-xx-xxxx) must not be 000, 666 or 900-999

data.name: UsSsnInvalidCharacterEncountered
data.value: US Social Security Number must only contain digit characters (0-9) in non-separator character locations

data.name: CaSinInvalidCharacterEncountered
data.value: CA Social Insurance Number must only contain digit characters (0-9) in non-separator character locations

data.name: UsSsnInvalidGroupNumber
data.value: US Social Security Number group number segment (xxx-GG-xxxx) must not be 00

data.name: UsSsnInvalidLength
data.value: US Social Security Number must have length 9 (digits only) or 11 (9 digits with two separator characters)

data.name: UsSsnInvalidRun
data.value: US Social Security Number may not have sequence 123456789

data.name: UsSsnInvalidSeparatorEncountered
data.value: US Social Security Number with length 11 contains an unexpected character at a separator position

data.name: UsSsnInvalidSerialNumber
data.value: US Social Security Number serial number segment (xxx-xx-SSSS) must not be 0000

data.name: ValidationPassed
data.value: Value does not contain any validation errors

data.name: CaSinInvalidSeparatorEncountered
data.value: CA Social Insurance Number with length 11 contains an unexpected character at a separator position

data.name: CaSinInvalidCheckDigit
data.value: CA Social Insurance Number contains an invalid check digit

data.name: CaSinInvalidProvince
data.value: CA Social Insurance Number may not have a leading digit (the province indicator) of zero (0) or eight (8)

data.name: MxCurpEmpty
data.value: MX CURP may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: MxCurpInvalidLength
data.value: MX CURP must have length 18

data.name: MxCurpInvalidAlphabeticCharacterEncountered
data.value: MX CURP requires alphabetic characters in positions 0-3 and 13-15 (zero-based)

data.name: MxCurpInvalidDateOfBirth
data.value: MX CURP requires valid six digit date of birth (YYMMDD) in character positions 4-9 (zero-based)

data.name: MxCurpInvalidGender
data.value: MX CURP requires a gender code of H (Hombre), M (Mujer) or X (non-binary) in character position 10 (zero-based)

data.name: MxCurpInvalidState
data.value: MX CURP requires a valid two letter state code in character positions 11-12 (zero-based)

data.name: MxCurpInvalidHomoclave
data.value: MX CURP requires an alphanumeric character in character position 16 (zero-based). This is the homoclave character assigned by RENAPO

data.name: MxCurpInvalidCheckDigit
data.value: MX CURP requires a digit character in character position 17 (zero-based). This is the check digit assigned by RENAPO

data.name: UsNpiEmpty
data.value: US National Provider Identifier may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: UsNpiInvalidLength
data.value: US National Provider Identifier must have length 10

data.name: UsNpiInvalidCharacterEncountered
data.value: US National Provider Identifier must only contain digit characters (0-9)

data.name: UsNpiInvalidCheckDigit
data.value: US National Provider Identifier contains an invalid check digit

data.name: UsItinEmpty
data.value: US Individual Taxpayer Identification Number may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: UsItinInvalidLength
data.value: US Individual Taxpayer Identification Number must have length 9 (digits only) or 11 (9 digits with two separator characters)

data.name: UsItinInvalidSeparatorEncountered
data.value: US Individual Taxpayer Identification Number with length 11 contains an unexpected character at a separator position

data.name: UsItinInvalidCharacterEncountered
data.value: US Individual Taxpayer Identification Number must only contain digit characters (0-9) in non-separator character locations

data.name: UsItinInvalidAreaNumber
data.value: US Individual Taxpayer Identification Number area number segment (AAA-xx-xxxx) must not be 000-899

data.name: UsItinInvalidGroupNumber
data.value: US Individual Taxpayer Identification Number group number segment (xxx-GG-xxxx) must not be 00-49, 66-69, 89 or 93

data.name: SePersonnummerEmpty
data.value: SE Personnummer may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: SePersonnummerInvalidLength
data.value: SE Personnummer must have length 11 (YYMMDD format) or 13 (YYYYMMDD format)

data.name: SePersonnummerInvalidDateOfBirth
data.value: SE Personnummer requires valid six digit date of birth (YYMMDD) in character positions 0-5 (zero-based) or a valid eight digit date of birth (YYYYMMDD) in character positions 0-7 (zero-based)

data.name: SePersonnummerInvalidSeparator
data.value: SE Personnummer must have a valid separator character (either '-' or '+') in character position 6 (zero-based, YYMMDD format) or character position 8 (zero-based, YYYYMMDD format)

data.name: SePersonnummerInvalidCheckDigit
data.value: SE Personnummer must have a valid Luhn algorithm check digit in character position 10 (YYMMDD format) or character position 12 (YYYYMMDD format)

data.name: NoFoedselsnummerInvalidLength
data.value: NO Foedselsnummer must have length 11 (no separator character) or 12 (separator character)

data.name: NoFoedselsnummerEmpty
data.value: NO Foedselsnummer may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: NoFoedselsnummerInvalidDateOfBirth
data.value: NO Foedselsnummer requires a valid six digit date of birth (DDMMYY) format in character positions 0-5 (zero-based)

data.name: NoFoedselsnummerInvalidSeparator
data.value: NO Foedselsnummer separator character must not be a digit

data.name: NoFoedselsnummerInvalidCheckDigits
data.value: NO Foedselsnummer must have two valid check digit characters in the trailing (right-most) positions

data.name: NoFoedselsnummerInvalidCharacter
data.value: NO Foedselsnummer contains a non-digit character where a digit was expected

data.name: SePersonnummerInvalidCharacter
data.value: SE Personnummer contains a non-digit character where a digit was expected

data.name: IsKennitalaEmpty
data.value: IS Kennitala may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: IsKennitalaInvalidCharacter
data.value: IS Kennitala contains a non-digit character where a digit was expected

data.name: IsKennitalaInvalidCheckDigit
data.value: IS Kennitala must have a valid check digit character in the second character from the right of the value

data.name: IsKennitalaInvalidLength
data.value: IS Kennitala must have length 10 (no separator character) or 11 (separator character)

data.name: IsKennitalaInvalidDateOfBirth
data.value: IS Kennitala requires a valid six digit date of birth (DDMMYY) format in character positions 0-5 (zero-based)

data.name: IsKennitalaInvalidSeparator
data.value: IS Kennitala separator character must not be a digit

data.name: IsKennitalaInvalidCentury
data.value: IS Kennitala century indicator must be either '9' or '0'

data.name: DkPersonnummerEmpty
data.value: DK Personnummer may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: DkPersonnummerInvalidLength
data.value: DK Personnummer must have length 10 (no separator character) or 11 (separator character)

data.name: DkPersonnummerInvalidCharacter
data.value: DK Personnummer contains a non-digit character where a digit was expected

data.name: DkPersonnummerInvalidSeparator
data.value: DK Personnummer separator character must be a dash ('-')

data.name: DkPersonnummerInvalidDateOfBirth
data.value: DK Personnummer requires a valid six digit date of birth (DDMMYY) format in character positions 0-5 (zero-based)

data.name: FiHenkilotunnusEmpty
data.value: FI Henkilotunnus number may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: FiHenkilotunnusInvalidLength
data.value: FI Henkilotunnus must have length 11

data.name: FiHenkilotunnusInvalidCharacter
data.value: FI Henkilotunnus contains a non-digit character in the date of birth or individual number elements

data.name: FiHenkilotunnusInvalidCheckDigit
data.value: FI Henkilotunnus must have a valid modulus 31 check character in the trailing (right-most) position

data.name: FiHenkilotunnusInvalidCenturyIndicator
data.value: FI Henkilotunnus has an invalid century indicator in character position 6 (zero-based)

data.name: FiHenkilotunnusInvalidIndividualNumber
data.value: FI Henkilotunnus may not have an individual number less than "002" in character positions 7-9 (zero-based)

data.name: FiHenkilotunnusInvalidDateOfBirth
data.value: FI Henkilotunnus requires a valid six digit date of birth (DDMMYY) format in character positions 0-5 (zero-based)

data.name: NlBurgerservicenummerEmpty
data.value: NL Burgerservicenummer may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: NlBurgerservicenummerInvalidLength
data.value: NL Burgerservicenummer must have length 9 (without separator characters) or 11 (with separator characters)

data.name: NlBurgerservicenummerInvalidCharacter
data.value: NL Burgerservicenummer contains a non-digit character where a digit was expected

data.name: NlBurgerservicenummerInvalidCheckDigit
data.value: NL Burgerservicenummer must have a valid modulus 11 (11-proef) check digit in the trailing (right-most) position

data.name: NlBurgerservicenummerInvalidSeparator
data.value: NL Burgerservicenummer separator character may not be a digit and the same non-digit character must be present in both separator character locations

data.name: BeRijksregisternummerEmpty
data.value: BE Rijksregisternummer may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: BeRijksregisternummerInvalidLength
data.value: BE Rijksregisternummer must have length 11 (without separator characters) or 15 (with separator characters)

data.name: BeRijksregisternummerInvalidCharacter
data.value: BE Rijksregisternummer contains a non-digit character where a digit was expected

data.name: BeRijksregisternummerInvalidCheckDigits
data.value: BE Rijksregisternummer must have a valid modulus 97 check sum in the two trailing (right-most) character positions

data.name: BeRijksregisternummerInvalidSeparator
data.value: BE Rijksregisternummer with length 15 may not have digit characters (0-9) in character positions 2, 5, 8 or 12 (zero-based)

data.name: BeRijksregisternummerInvalidDateOfBirth
data.value: BE Rijksregisternummer must have a valid date of birth in YYMMDD format as the leading (left-most) digits

data.name: YearOutOfRange
data.value: Year value must be between 1 and 9999, inclusive

data.name: MonthOutOfRange
data.value: Month must be between 1 and 12, inclusive

data.name: DayOutOfRange
data.value: Day must be between 1 and 31, inclusive

data.name: DayOutOfRangeForYearAndMonth
data.value: Day {0} is invalid for year {1} and month {2}

data.name: DateResultPartialDateToDateOnly
data.value: Cannot convert a partial or unknown date to a DateOnly type.

data.name: BeRijksregisternummerInvalidSequenceNumber
data.value: BE Rijksregisternummer sequence number may not be '000' or '999'

data.name: FrInseeNumberEmpty
data.value: FR INSEE may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: FrInseeNumberInvalidLength
data.value: FR INSEE number must have length 15 (without separators) or 21 (with separators)

data.name: FrInseeNumberInvalidCharacter
data.value: FR INSEE number contains a non-digit character where a digit was expected

data.name: FrInseeNumberInvalidCheckDigits
data.value: FR INSEE number must have a valid modulus 97 check sum in the two trailing (right-most) character positions

data.name: FrInseeNumberInvalidSeparator
data.value: FR INSEE number with length 21 may not have digit characters (0-9) in character positions 1, 4, 7, 10, 14 and 18 (zero-based) and the same character must be used in each location

data.name: FrInseeNumberInvalidGender
data.value: FR INSEE number requires a gender code of 1 (male), 2 (female) or 7 (male), 8 (female) for temporary INSEE numbers

data.name: FrInseeNumberInvalidMonth
data.value: FR INSEE number must have a month value between 01 and 12 (for known dates) or 12, 20-42, 50-99 (for persons with unknown or incomplete date of birth documentation)

data.name: FrInseeNumberInvalidDepartment
data.value: FR INSEE number must have a valid INSEE department code

data.name: EsNifEmpty
data.value: ES NIF may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: EsNifInvalidLength
data.value: ES NIF must have length 9 (no separators), 10 (DNI with one separator) or 11 (NIE with two separators)

data.name: EsNifInvalidCharacter
data.value: ES NIF contains a character that was not expected. For DNI, the leading (left-most) eight characters must be ASCII digits ('0'-'9'). For NIE, the leading character must be X, Y or Z and the next seven non-separator characters must be ASCII digits.

data.name: EsNifInvalidCheckDigit
data.value: ES NIF must have a valid modulus 23 check character in the trailing (right-most) position

data.name: EsNifInvalidSeparator
data.value: ES NIF separator character may not be an ASCII digit ('0'-'9'). For NIE both separator characters must be the same

data.name: IePpsNumberEmpty
data.value: IE PPS Number may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: IePpsNumberInvalidLength
data.value: IE PPS Number must have length of eight characters or nine characters

data.name: IePpsNumberInvalidCharacter
data.value: IE PPS Number must have digit characters (0-9) in character positions 0-6 (zero-based), a letter in the range A-W in character position 7 (zero-based) and optionally, a letter in the range A-I or W in character position 8 (zero-based)

data.name: IePpsNumberInvalidCheckDigit
data.value: IE PPS Number must have valid weighted modulus 23 check character in character position 7 (zero-based)

data.name: GbNationalInsuranceNumberEmpty
data.value: GB National Insurance Number may not be null, empty or all whitespace characters

data.name: GbNationalInsuranceNumberInvalidLength
data.value: GB National Insurance Number must have length 8 (unformatted, without suffix), 9 (unformatted, with suffix), 11 (formatted, without suffix) or 13 (formatted, with suffix)

data.name: GbNationalInsuranceNumberInvalidPrefix
data.value: GB National Insurance Number leading (left-most) two characters may not be BG, GB, NK, KN, TN, NT, or ZZ

data.name: GbNationalInsuranceNumberInvalidCharacter
data.value: GB National Insurance Number contains one or more invalid characters. Offset 0 must contain A-C, E, G, H, J-P, R-T, W-Z. Offset 1 must contain A-C, E, G, H, J-N, P, R-T, W-Z. Offsets 2-7 must contain ASCII digits. Offset 8, if present, must contain A-D.

data.name: GbNationalInsuranceNumberInvalidSeparator
data.value: GB National Insurance Number with length 11 or 13 contains an invalid separator character. Separator characters may not be ASCII digits ('0'-'9') or uppercase or lowercase letters (A-Z, a-z). All separator locations must contain the same character.

data.name: GbPatientNumberUnformattedLength
data.value: An GB patient number (NHS, CHI or H&C) without any separator characters

data.name: GbPatientNumberDoubleSeparatorFormattedLength
data.value: A formatted NHS, H&C or test patient number with separator characters at offsets 3 and 7 (zero-based)

data.name: EmptyValueDescription
data.value: Value may not be null, empty ("") or all whitespace characters

data.name: ValidValueDescription
data.value: Value is valid

data.name: GbPatientNumberInvalidLength
data.value: GB patient number must have a length of 10 (without separators), 11 (CHI number with separator) or 12 (NHS, H&C or test number with separators)

data.name: GbPatientNumberInvalidCharacter
data.value: GB patient number must have only digit characters (0-9) in non-separator positions

data.name: GbPatientNumberInvalidCheckDigit
data.value: GB patient number must have a valid Modulus 11 check digit in the trailing (right-most) character position

data.name: GbPatientNumberInvalidSeparator
data.value: GB patient number may not contain an ASCII digit (0-9) in a separator position and both separator positions must contain the same non-digit character

data.name: GbNhsNumberInvalidRange
data.value: GB NHS Number must be in the range 400 000 000 to 499 999 999, 600 000 000 to 799 999 999, or 900 000 000 to 999 999 999, excluding trailing check digit

data.name: GbHcNumberInvalidRange
data.value: GB H&C Number must be in the range 320 000 000 to 399 999 999 or 900 000 000 to 999 999 999, excluding trailing check digit

data.name: GbChiNumberInvalidRange
data.value: GB CHI Number must be in the range 010 000 000 to 311 299 999, excluding trailing check digit

data.name: GbChiNumberInvalidDateOfBirth
data.value: GB CHI Number must contain a valid date of birth (in DDMMYY format) as the first six digits

data.name: InvalidCenturyCutoff
data.value: Century cutoff must be an integer between 1 and 100 (inclusive)

data.name: InvalidYearForYyToYyyyConversion
data.value: The value to convert from a two-digit year to a four-digit year must be in the range 0-99 or 1000-9999

data.name: GbPatientNumberSingleSeparatorFormattedLength
data.value: A formatted CHI number with a single separator character at offset 6 (zero-based)

data.name: GbPatientNumberInvalidRange
data.value: GB patient number must be in the range 010 000 000 to 311 299 999, 320 000 000 to 399 999 999, 400 000 000 to 499 999 999, 600 000 000 to 799 999 999, or 900 000 000 to 999 999 999, excluding trailing check digit

data.name: UsTinUnformattedLength
data.value: A US TIN (SSN or ITIN) without separator characters

data.name: UsSsnFormattedLength
data.value: A US TIN (SSN or ITIN) with separator characters at offsets 3 and 6 (zero-based)
